CONTENT.International career: On 10 December 2019, Soma made his international debut in a 2–1 win against China in the 2019 EAFF E-1 Football Championship. On 22 July 2022, Soma scored his first 2 international goals in a 6–0 win over Hong Kong in the 2022 EAFF E-1 Football Championship.On 1 November 2022, Soma was included in Japan's 26-man squad for the 2022 FIFA World Cup in Qatar.On 11 July 2024, Soma officially returned to Nagoya Grampus.

SUMMARY: Yuki Soma (相馬 勇紀, Sōma Yūki, born 25 February 1997) is a Japanese professional footballer who plays as a winger for J1 League club Machida Zelvia, and the Japan national team.
